## What this changes

Briefly, in plain language.

## Checklist

- [ ] `node --test` passes
- [ ] `npm run check:links` passes
- [ ] If I changed a doc, I updated **both** the `.ru.md` (canonical) and the English `.md`
- [ ] If I added/renamed/removed a skill, both plugin manifests still match `skills/` (the test enforces this)
- [ ] If I bumped the version, all four version strings match and `CHANGELOG.md` is updated
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated under `## [Unreleased]` for any user-visible change
- [ ] No AI/agent attribution in commit messages

## Notes for reviewers

Anything worth calling out — trade-offs, follow-ups, things intentionally left out of scope.
